evals.prompt: Scan the test_data/ directory and generate meta.json describing all HDF5 and MAT files
evals.expected_output: A valid meta.json with summary and per-file metadata for 8 files

evals.prompt: Scan test_data/ where some .mat files are MATLAB v7.3 format, enable wildcard merging
evals.expected_output: meta.json with v7.3 files detected and TimeSeries.h5 files merged into wildcard entry

evals.prompt: I have 3 subjects with TimeSeries.h5 and data_full.mat each, generate a metadata catalog
evals.expected_output: meta.json showing merged subject entries with dimension ranges
